a:T6cf0,<div class="specification">
<p>A broad bean is the seed of a species, <em>Vicia faba</em>, in the Fabaceae, a family of flowering plants. This family contains many species that are used as sources of food.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>On the diagram, label the testa and the radicle.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>An experiment was done to test the hypothesis that temperature affects the rate of germination of the broad bean. Outline <strong>two</strong> factors apart from temperature that should be controlled in this experiment.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State the genus of the broad bean.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Broad beans are rich in starch and cellulose. Compare and contrast the structure of starch and cellulose.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Once the germinated bean grows above the ground, state the process used by the bean in the production of starch.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">e.</div>
</div>b:T2ada,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. testa labelled ✔</p>
<p>b. radicle labelled ✔ (<em>must point to the bottom half of the embryo or the tip</em>).</p>
<p><img height="163" src="data:image/png;base64," width="194"/></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. same amount/type of soil/substrate / pH of soil ✔ <em>e.g.: heater </em></p>
<p>b. same amount of water / humidity ✔</p>
<p>c. oxygen/aeration ✔</p>
<p>d. same measurement of germination / time ✔ <em>e.g.: emergence of radicle</em></p>
<p>e. same number/source/age of seeds ✔</p>
<p><em>Accept discussion of light only in as much as it relates to temperature</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><em>Vicia</em> ✔</p>
<p><em>No mark if the species name is included</em>.</p>
<p><em>Mark can be awarded if the genus is not capitalized</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. both polymers of glucose molecules / polysaccharides <br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/> both form 1,4 glycosidic bond ✔</p>
<p>b. starch is formed by alpha glucose while cellulose is formed by beta glucose <br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/> in starch C1 hydroxyl groups are found in same plane while in cellulose on different planes <br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/> in cellulose, alternatively the beta glucose needs to be placed upside-down in order to have C1 hydroxyl groups on the same plane <br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/> two types of starch (amylose and amylopectin) but one type of cellulose ✔</p>
<p><em>One similarity and one difference</em>.</p>
<p><em>Comparison to cellulose needed</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>photosynthesis </p>
<p><em>Do not accept condensation or polymerization; if list of processes given, mark the first answer</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">e.</div>
</div>c:T557,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Many candidates did not correctly label the testa and in many cases the radicle was labelled too high up, pointing at the hypocotyl.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Several answers considered how light is needed for germination without any reference to its relationship to temperature.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>This question presented some confusion to Spanish speaking candidates since the word "género" is the same for "genus" and "gender", so some candidates write "male/female" in their answers. </p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Candidates seemed to find it difficult to find similarities and differences in structure between starch and cellulose, and many wrote about their functions, or simply mentioned that both were made of "glucose" without referencing that they are both polymers. There was limited recognition that there are two forms of starch: amylose and amylopectin that differ in their degree of branching.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
[N/A]
<div class="question_part_label">e.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/2/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","2"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"21M.2.HL.TZ2.3"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","2"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"21M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","2-3-carbohydrates-and-lipids, 9-3-growth-in-plants, 5-3-classification-of-biodiversity, 9-4-reproduction-in-plants"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}]]}]
